summary: Gruber provides a brief update on the shipping timeline for new Daring Fireball t-shirts. The shirts, designed by Kevin Cornell and produced in partnership with Oddica, were originally expected to ship by the end of April but were delayed. The delay was caused by underestimating demand and needing extra time to determine print quantities. He notes the new designs have been very popular and confirms shirts are now in production with worldwide shipping expected by the end of the following week.
key_points: New DF t-shirts designed by Kevin Cornell were delayed past their original end-of-April shipping target
The delay was caused by unexpectedly high demand requiring more time to determine print quantities
Shirts are produced and fulfilled through a partnership with Oddica
Shipping worldwide was expected to begin by end of the following week
money_quotes: The new Kevin Cornell-designed shirts are a hit, to say the least.
key_insight: A short logistical update noting that demand for new Daring Fireball merchandise exceeded expectations, causing a brief shipping delay.
